failedAssertions.reason: workingDirectory is accepted in CreateSessionOptions but not serialized in SessionDTO responses. The SessionDTO type in mobile-contracts does not include a workingDirectory field, so the serializer correctly omits it. Either the DTO needs updating to include it, or the assertion needs revision.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Test server mock has no API to create/seed message history. GET session returns messages:[] with correct structure and pagination metadata (hasMore, nextCursor), but MessageDTO content cannot be verified via user surface. Unit tests in session-serializers.test.ts do cover MessageDTO serialization.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Gateway API (curl) section with server URL, auth details, isolation rules, and report format.
